_comment: Max 8 skills per API request. Route by task_type at call time.

governance.description: Architecture decisions, IaC, DevOps gate, GA readiness

tenant-lifecycle.description: Onboarding, go-live, UAT, control plane, live-site ops

finance-ops.description: Finance PPM, expense, RBAC, behavior resolution, publishable outputs

intelligence.description: Research tools, RAG, run tracing, self-healing, evals

routing_logic.comment: In agent-platform, resolve bundle at request time from task context.
routing_logic.fallback: Load the two most relevant skills from any bundle based on task description.

cross_surface_note.claude_code_plugins: Skills installed via 'claude plugin install pulser-odoo@ipai-plugins' are available in Claude Code sessions only.
cross_surface_note.api_skills: Skills uploaded via Anthropic Skills API are available in agent-platform API calls only.
cross_surface_note.not_synced: These two surfaces do NOT sync. Maintain both: plugins for Claude Code dev sessions, API uploads for agent-platform runtime.
cross_surface_note.source_of_truth: agents/skills/<name>/SKILL.md is the single source. Publish to both surfaces from there.
